title: Flea Treatment in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn | $350–$650 | Best Pest Control NYC
metaDescription: Professional flea treatment in Bensonhurst, Brooklyn. Fast, effective flea extermination for homes and apartments. Licensed experts. Call now for same-day service!
intro: Dealing with a flea infestation in your Bensonhurst home? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, effective flea treatment services throughout this vibrant Brooklyn neighborhood. Our experienced technicians use proven methods to eliminate fleas at every life stage, protecting your family and pets from these persistent pests.
whyUs: With over 15 years serving Bensonhurst residents, we understand the unique pest challenges facing Brooklyn homes, from multi-family brownstones to single-family houses. Our licensed technicians provide thorough treatments with guaranteed results and follow-up visits to ensure complete flea elimination.
localContext: Bensonhurst's dense residential neighborhoods, from the pre-war apartments along 86th Street to the family homes near Seth Low Park, create ideal conditions for flea infestations, especially in buildings with pets. Our team is familiar with the area's diverse housing stock and provides customized treatment plans for co-ops, rentals, and single-family homes throughout the 11214 and 11204 zip codes.

faqs.question: How much does flea treatment cost in Bensonhurst?
faqs.answer: Our flea treatment services in Bensonhurst range from $350 to $650, depending on the size of your home, severity of the infestation, and number of rooms requiring treatment. We provide free inspections and upfront pricing with no hidden fees.

faqs.question: How long does flea treatment take to work?
faqs.answer: You'll notice a significant reduction in flea activity within 24-48 hours after treatment. Complete elimination typically takes 2-3 weeks as our treatment targets fleas at all life stages. We include a follow-up visit to ensure all eggs and larvae are eliminated.

faqs.question: Do I need to leave my Bensonhurst apartment during flea treatment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we recommend that all people and pets vacate the premises for 3-4 hours during and after treatment. You'll need to remove or cover food items, and we'll provide detailed preparation instructions. Your home will be safe to re-enter once the products have dried.

faqs.question: Can fleas come back after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment is designed to eliminate fleas completely, but re-infestation can occur if pets bring in new fleas from outside or neighboring units. We offer preventative maintenance plans and provide guidance on protecting your Bensonhurst home long-term, including pet treatment recommendations.
